name: Jody Hojin Kimmel
bio: Jody Hojin Kimmel Sensei is the Training Director at Zen Mountain Monastery and also teaches at the Fire Lotus Temple in Brooklyn, New York. She received dharma transmission in the Mountains and Rivers Order and is known for her teaching on Zen arts, photography, and the intersection of creative practice and meditation. She has been in residential training at the monastery for over two decades.
